changeSet.author: nour
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS vehicle_mot_history ( id BIGINT GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY, vehicle_id BIGINT NOT NULL, test_date DATE NOT NULL, expiry_date DATE, result VARCHAR(20), advisory TEXT, failure_items TEXT, mileage BIGINT, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), created_by VARCHAR(255) );
COMMENT ON TABLE vehicle_mot_history IS 'MOT pass/fail timeline used in the Vehicle Passport';
